findings.blocker: Fundamental Mathlib gap: IsLocalization.of_le extends from smaller to larger submonoid (M ≤ N), but we need the opposite direction. We have IsLocalization q.primeCompl and proved algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl ≤ q.primeCompl, but need IsLocalization (algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl). No Mathlib lemma exists to restrict from larger to smaller localization.

attempts.strategy: Prove q.primeCompl ≤ algebraMapSubmonoid by contradiction with disjoint proof
attempts.code_tried:
intro n hn
by_contra hnot
have hdisjoint : Disjoint (Ideal.span {n}) (algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) := by
  intro x hx_span hx_sub
  ...
attempts.lean_error: Cannot prove Disjoint (Ideal.span {n}) (algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) - not generally true
attempts.insight: If n ∉ algebraMapSubmonoid, it doesn't mean span {n} is disjoint from it. Wrong direction.

attempts.strategy: Use Ideal.disjoint_primeCompl_of_liesOver to prove algebraMapSubmonoid ≤ q.primeCompl, then apply IsLocalization.of_le
attempts.code_tried:
have hdisjoint : Disjoint (↑(Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) : Set S) (↑q : Set S) :=
  Ideal.disjoint_primeCompl_of_liesOver q p
have hsub : Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl ≤ q.primeCompl := by
  intro x hx
  rw [Ideal.mem_primeCompl_iff_not_mem]
  exact Set.disjoint_left.mp hdisjoint hx
apply @IsLocalization.of_le S _ q.primeCompl (Localization.AtPrime q) _ _ _ (Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) hsub
attempts.lean_error: Application type mismatch: The argument hsub has type algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl ≤ q.primeCompl but is expected to have type q.primeCompl ≤ algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl
attempts.insight: IsLocalization.of_le requires M ≤ N to extend from M to N, but we proved the opposite direction. This is the core blocker.

attempts.strategy: Search for alternative IsLocalization construction lemmas
attempts.insight: Searched for 'IsLocalization smaller submonoid', 'two submonoids same ring', 'localization unique when elements are units'. Only found IsLocalization.of_le which goes the wrong direction.

attempts.strategy: Direct construction using isLocalization_iff with three conditions
attempts.code_tried:
apply isLocalization_iff.mpr
constructor
· intro s hs
  obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := hs
  exact IsLocalization.map_units _ ⟨r, hr⟩
constructor
· intro z
  obtain ⟨x, s, rfl⟩ := IsLocalization.mk'_surjective q.primeCompl z
  refine ⟨x, ⟨↑s, hsub ?_, ?_⟩⟩
attempts.lean_error: Cannot prove surjectivity - need denominators in algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl but only have denominators in q.primeCompl (the larger submonoid)
attempts.goal_after: ⊢ ∀ z, ∃ x s, mk' (algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl) x s = z
attempts.insight: Cannot convert denominators from larger to smaller submonoid without additional structure. Surjectivity blocked.
